headline: Trane Technologies Expands HVAC Training And Workforce As Valuation Stays Rich
summary: Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) has opened the Trane Advanced Technology Training Center, described as the largest and most technologically advanced HVAC training facility in the world. The company also announced a major expansion of its technician workforce to support growing demand for advanced HVAC systems. These moves are tied to Trane Technologies' efforts to support clean energy initiatives and more energy efficient heating and cooling solutions. For investors watching NYSE:TT, the new...
